examples: The road was deeply rutted and pooled with rain.
The road ahead looks as rutted, rocky and slow as any in rural Haiti.
On a rutted dirt road in rural Henan Province, Chung To, A.M. ’91, entered a destitute farmhouse.
There were no changing rooms, no stands, no TV cameras, only a deeply rutted pitch.
Today you reach Baan Borang over a paved road instead of taking your chances on a winding, rutted 12-kilometer jeep track.
